content: JRA 2019 summer-meet (June 2019) class reform: (1) abolition of 4yo prize-money halving/demotion, (2) renaming conditions from prize-money to win-count: 500man->1shou, 1000man->2shou, 1600man/jun-open->3shou. CRITICAL: JRA-VAN race-condition codes NOT changed, code 005 maps to BOTH 500man-shita AND 1shou-class (JV-Data spec unchanged to preserve historical data). Shinba/Mishouri/Open names unchanged. Reform shifted competitive balance. Sources: JRA rules page, JRA-VAN developer forum topic 305, JRA-VAN data-change notice 2018-12-05.
